questions.question: Describe a key difference between the backtracking algorithm used to solve the n-Queens problem and the backtracking algorithm used to solve the Subset-sum problem. (5 marks)
Explain how the Branch-and-Bound algorithm can be used to solve the 0/1 Knapsack problem. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the following constraints: W <= W_max, V <= V_max

questions.question: What is the main advantage of using an approximation algorithm to solve the Traveling Salesman Problem, and what are some common techniques used in such algorithms? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the following trade-offs: approximation ratio, time complexity, problem size
